faq.title: Common questions from importers, distributors and project buyers.
faq.text: Use this section to reduce repeated communication and guide visitors toward a qualified inquiry.

items.question: Can you make custom PET Felt Acoustic Lights?
items.answer: Yes. We support OEM/ODM customization for size, shape, PET Felt color, wattage, CCT, dimming, mounting accessories, logo and packaging.

items.question: What buyer types do you mainly serve?
items.answer: Lighting importers, distributors, acoustic panel brands, office furniture brands, building material wholesalers, contractors, designers, architects and acoustic consultants.

items.question: Can you provide samples before bulk orders?
items.answer: Yes. MOQ can start from 1 piece. Regular styles can usually be prepared within 7 days, while customer drawing-based custom styles usually take about 15-20 days for sample development.

items.question: Can you support certificates for different markets?
items.answer: Certificate requirements should be confirmed by target market and product specification. FLOSEEK can support certificate materials through the KingOrnan parent brand when needed.

seo.title: Office & Meeting Room Acoustic Lighting Projects | FLOSEEK
seo.description: Explore office and meeting room acoustic lighting applications from FLOSEEK, with project-style cases for open offices, boardrooms, client lounges and training rooms.

hero.title: Acoustic lighting for workplaces where speech clarity matters.
hero.text: FLOSEEK combines PET Felt acoustic surfaces with architectural LED lighting for open offices, meeting rooms, boardrooms and flexible collaboration spaces.
hero.imageAlt: Open office with PET Felt acoustic linear lights above workstations

intro.title: Replace visual clutter with lighting that also manages room sound.
intro.text: Office interiors often need lighting, acoustic control and a clean ceiling language at the same time. PET Felt acoustic luminaires help reduce reflected speech noise around workstations and meeting tables while giving designers a visible material finish to coordinate with furniture, ceilings and wall panels.

items.title: Speech-focused zones
items.text: Use acoustic pendants above conference tables, huddle rooms and video-call rooms to improve comfort around conversations.

items.title: Workstation rows
items.text: Linear baffle lights can follow desk layouts, adding downlight and absorption without a separate ceiling raft.

items.title: Design coordination
items.text: PET Felt color, pendant geometry, CCT, dimming and suspension details can be adjusted for the project palette.

cases.title: Realistic office scenarios built from common project briefs.
cases.text: The following cases are newly written examples based on workplace project requirements. They follow the type of information a designer or buyer would expect while using original names, descriptions and scene imagery.

items.name: Ningbo Harbor Tech Operations Floor
items.designRole: Workplace consultant and local electrical contractor
items.product: Charcoal PET Felt linear acoustic lights, 4000K, workstation rows
items.alt: Open-plan office project with charcoal PET Felt acoustic linear lighting
items.brief: A growing technology team needed a calmer workstation floor without lowering the ceiling with a heavy acoustic system. Long felt luminaires were aligned to desk islands so the lighting plan and acoustic treatment read as one element.
results: Linear layout matched 24 workstation rows
Felt finish coordinated with desk privacy screens
Warm-neutral LED output supported all-day office use

items.name: Riverside Capital Boardroom Suite
items.designRole: Interior design studio and procurement partner
items.product: Blue-grey PET Felt ring pendants, DALI dimming, CRI 90 LED
items.alt: Executive boardroom with blue grey PET Felt acoustic ring pendant lights
items.brief: The boardroom required a strong ceiling feature for video meetings and client presentations. Oversized acoustic ring pendants softened the room visually while adding absorption above the long timber table.
results: Grouped rings created a premium focal point
Dimming scenes supported presentation and discussion modes
PET Felt color matched acoustic wall panels

items.name: Lumen & Vale Client Meeting Lounge
items.sector: Law firm reception and client rooms
items.designRole: Architect, lighting designer and furniture contractor
items.product: Charcoal, teal and warm grey ribbed PET Felt pendants, 3000K
items.alt: Law firm client lounge with KO-XYM-0134 ribbed PET Felt acoustic pendant lighting
items.brief: A legal workplace wanted a quieter waiting and consultation zone next to glazed meeting rooms. KO-XYM-0134 ribbed PET Felt pendants introduced warmer light over small tables while the felt surfaces supported the lounge's restrained acoustic strategy.
results: Dome form softened glass-heavy meeting areas
3000K lighting improved hospitality feel
Neutral felt tones blended with timber and upholstery

items.name: AsterWorks Project Learning Hub
items.designRole: Workplace strategy team and fit-out contractor
items.product: Teal, rust and light grey hexagonal acoustic luminaires
items.alt: Training room with colorful PET Felt acoustic pendant lights
items.brief: A flexible training room needed brighter identity than the surrounding office while remaining practical for workshops. Hexagonal and linear acoustic luminaires helped define zones without fixed partitions.
results: Color-coded fixtures supported wayfinding and room identity
Suspended acoustic surfaces worked with pin-up wall panels
Modular layout remained open for training and project sprints

seo.title: Education Space Acoustic Lighting Projects | FLOSEEK
seo.description: Explore education acoustic lighting applications for classrooms, libraries, maker labs and early learning spaces using PET Felt acoustic luminaires.

hero.title: Acoustic lighting for classrooms, libraries and shared learning zones.
hero.text: FLOSEEK PET Felt acoustic luminaires combine comfortable light, sound absorption and durable material finishes for education interiors where speech, focus and flexibility matter.
hero.imageAlt: Modern classroom with KO-XYM-0164 linear acoustic baffle lights

intro.title: Support learning spaces with calmer sound and consistent task light.
intro.text: Education projects often need durable fixtures that help teachers and students hear each other while keeping the ceiling design simple. Acoustic lighting can reduce reflected sound around desks, reading tables and project zones without adding a separate acoustic raft.

items.title: Speech and focus
items.text: Use acoustic luminaires above teaching walls, reading tables and group desks to support clearer everyday communication.

items.title: Flexible layouts
items.text: Suspended linear, disc, petal and hexagonal forms can follow classroom rows, library tables or maker-lab islands.

items.title: Project coordination
items.text: PET Felt color, CCT, suspension length, dimming and product packaging can be coordinated for classroom rollout projects.

cases.title: Education scenarios built from practical learning-space briefs.
cases.text: These original examples follow the project-style information that architects, school operators and buyers usually need: space type, design team, product model, lighting scope and expected outcomes.

items.name: Hangzhou East Campus Teaching Wing
items.designRole: Education interior consultant and electrical contractor
items.product: Green PET Felt linear acoustic baffle lights, 4000K, classroom desk rows
items.alt: Classroom with KO-XYM-0164 PET Felt linear acoustic baffle lights above desks
items.brief: A teaching wing needed better speech comfort without lowering an already busy ceiling. Linear PET Felt luminaires were aligned with student desk rows so the lighting plan, acoustic surface and classroom layout worked as one system.
results: Parallel baffle layout supported consistent desk illumination
Felt finish coordinated with acoustic wall boards
Warm-neutral LED output remained practical for daily lessons

items.name: Suzhou Meridian Library Commons
items.designRole: Library planner, lighting designer and fit-out team
items.product: Layered PET Felt disc pendants, brass stem, quiet reading tables
items.alt: Campus library with KO-XYM-0121 layered acoustic disc pendant lights over study tables
items.brief: The library commons needed a calmer identity for group study tables while keeping enough visual warmth for long evening use. Layered disc pendants gave each table a recognizable focus point and added soft acoustic surfaces above the seating zone.
results: Pendant rhythm helped define reading and group-study areas
Layered colors added wayfinding without wall graphics
Integrated downlight supported table-based study tasks

items.name: Melbourne North STEAM Project Lab
items.sector: School maker lab and robotics classroom
items.designRole: STEM learning consultant and local installation partner
items.product: Teal, orange and light grey hexagonal PET Felt acoustic pendant panels
items.alt: STEAM maker classroom with KO-XYM-0146 hexagonal acoustic pendant panels
items.brief: A hands-on project room needed brighter identity and better comfort around noisy teamwork. Hexagonal acoustic pendant panels were suspended over mobile benches so work zones stayed open while the ceiling provided both color and absorption.
results: Color-coded fixtures marked project zones above workbenches
Center downlights supported detailed maker activities
Suspended panels kept wall storage and tool boards unobstructed

items.name: Singapore Orchard Early Reading Studio
items.sector: Early learning library and reading corner
items.designRole: Learning environment designer and preschool operator
items.product: Grey PET Felt petal acoustic pendants, soft reading circles
items.alt: Early learning reading area with KO-XYM-0155 petal acoustic pendant lights
items.brief: The reading studio needed a softer ceiling feature above child-scale tables and floor cushions. Petal acoustic pendants introduced a gentle visual form while keeping the lighting warm and comfortable for storytelling and quiet reading.
results: Sculptural felt pendants softened the reading corner
Low-glare light supported books, craft tables and floor seating
Neutral felt color coordinated with timber shelves and soft rugs

seo.title: KO-XYM-0137 Acoustic Ring Pendant Light | PET Felt Pendant Supplier
seo.description: KO-XYM-0137 PET felt acoustic ring pendant light for offices, meeting rooms and hospitality projects. Review sizes, wattage, CCT, dimming and OEM options.

productDetail.title: Acoustic Ring Pendant Light
productDetail.text: Round PET felt acoustic pendant light with integrated LED illumination for offices, meeting rooms, hospitality interiors and commercial project supply.
productDetail.lineDrawingAlt: KO-XYM-0137 acoustic ring pendant line drawing

overview.title: Product Overview
paragraphs: KO-XYM-0137 is a round acoustic pendant light with a layered felt body and a central LED diffuser. The circular form works above meeting tables, collaborative desks, lounge seating and hospitality interiors where lighting and acoustic comfort need to be specified together.

The PET felt exterior softens the visual mass of the pendant while the illuminated underside provides practical ambient light. The fixture is available in two sizes with diffuser panel or microprismatic diffuser optics, multiple color temperatures and project dimming options.
For B2B projects, FLOSEEK can coordinate felt color, suspension height, ceiling canopy, packaging and OEM/ODM details around your project schedule and market requirements.

scenes.title: Scene Application
scenes.text: Use KO-XYM-0137 where a round acoustic lighting feature can define meeting tables, reception points and shared work areas while adding PET felt sound-absorbing surface above the activity zone.

seo.title: About FLOSEEK | PET Felt Acoustic Lighting Manufacturer
seo.description: Learn about FLOSEEK, the high-end lighting sub-brand under KingOrnan, founded in 2024 with acoustic lighting as its core product category.

hero.title: A high-end acoustic lighting brand built for commercial project value.
hero.lead: FLOSEEK was founded in 2024 as a high-end lighting sub-brand under KingOrnan, with acoustic lighting as its main product category for design-led B2B projects.

story.title: A focused sub-brand for high-end acoustic lighting.
paragraphs: FLOSEEK was established in 2024 to focus on high-end acoustic lighting, especially PET Felt Acoustic Lighting for commercial interiors.

As a sub-brand under KingOrnan, FLOSEEK carries forward the parent brand's lighting manufacturing background while presenting a more focused identity for acoustic pendant, linear, ceiling, wall and floor lighting.
Our main product category is acoustic lighting, combining sound-absorbing PET felt materials with architectural LED systems for offices, hospitality, education and commercial interiors.
Today, FLOSEEK works as a focused acoustic lighting partner for buyers who need stable supply, custom development, clear communication and products that create value in their local market.
story.quote: Lighting should be simple, reliable, and valuable.

values.title: We focus on useful lighting solutions, not catalog items only.
values.text: FLOSEEK focuses the KingOrnan lighting background into acoustic lighting products that create design value, acoustic comfort and practical project support.

items.title: Create customer value
items.text: We help buyers develop products that fit their market, project requirements and brand position.

items.title: Provide practical solutions
items.text: From product structure and PET Felt color to LED specification, dimming, packaging and delivery, we support the full project path.

items.title: Build long-term trust
items.text: Clear communication, stable quality control and responsible after-sales support make cooperation easier for overseas B2B buyers.

timeline.title: From LED basics to acoustic lighting solutions.

items.title: KingOrnan founded
items.text: Alinna founded KingOrnan in China, starting with reliable LED panel, tube and batten lighting products.

items.title: Manufacturing expansion
items.text: The company expanded commercial lighting capability, materials processing and project-based production support.

items.title: Advanced commercial lighting focus
items.text: KingOrnan strengthened magnetic track lighting and higher-value commercial lighting systems.

items.title: FLOSEEK established
items.text: FLOSEEK was established as KingOrnan's high-end lighting sub-brand, with acoustic lighting as the primary product category.

items.title: Acoustic lighting partner
items.text: We develop PET Felt Acoustic Pendant Lights, linear lights and custom acoustic lighting systems for global B2B buyers.

cta.title: Ready to build your next acoustic lighting project?
cta.text: Share your target product, quantity, market, certification needs and design requirements. Our team will help confirm a practical solution.

seo.title: Restaurant & Hospitality Acoustic Lighting Projects | FLOSEEK
seo.description: Explore restaurant, cafe and hotel acoustic lighting applications using PET Felt pendant lights for warmer ambience, speech comfort and project-ready customization.

hero.title: Acoustic lighting for warm dining and hotel comfort.
hero.text: FLOSEEK PET Felt acoustic luminaires combine soft hospitality lighting, sound-absorbing surfaces and customizable forms for restaurants, cafes, hotel lobbies and guest-facing lounges.
hero.imageAlt: Restaurant dining room with KO-XYM-0185 slatted drum PET Felt acoustic pendant lights

intro.title: Shape the atmosphere while reducing hard-surface dining noise.
intro.text: Hospitality interiors often use timber, stone, glass and open seating plans that make conversation noise feel harder. PET Felt acoustic lighting places absorptive material near tables, counters and lounge seating while keeping the ceiling feature visually warm and decorative.

items.title: Dining comfort
items.text: Use acoustic pendants above booths, communal tables and private dining rooms to soften the sound field around guests.

items.title: Warm visual identity
items.text: Canopy, drum, ring and petal forms bring a softer material language than metal or glass pendants.

items.title: Project coordination
items.text: Confirm felt color, CCT, dimming, suspension height and packaging around the restaurant or hotel brand palette.

cases.title: Hospitality case studies inspired by real project requirements.
cases.text: These original case studies follow the information style of completed project references: location, sector, project team, product model, lighting scope and practical outcomes. Names and details are newly written for FLOSEEK and are not copied from the reference site.

items.name: Harbor View Social Dining Room
items.designRole: Hospitality design studio and local lighting contractor
items.product: Charcoal slatted PET Felt drum pendants, 3000K, table-group dimming scenes
items.alt: Upscale restaurant with KO-XYM-0185 slatted drum acoustic pendant lights above banquette tables
items.brief: A hotel restaurant wanted a warmer ceiling feature above booth seating without adding separate acoustic rafts. Repeated KO-XYM-0185 drum pendants created a calm rhythm over the dining plan while adding felt surface close to conversation zones.
results: Warm 3000K output supported dinner service ambience
Vertical felt ribs softened the timber-and-stone interior
Pendant spacing followed booth and two-seat table modules

items.name: Arcade House Lobby Lounge
items.sector: Boutique hotel lobby and lounge seating
items.designRole: Interior architect, lighting designer and procurement partner
items.product: Taupe and charcoal ribbed acoustic ring pendants, CRI 90, DALI dimming
items.alt: Boutique hotel lobby lounge with KO-XYM-0024 ribbed acoustic ring pendant lights
items.brief: The lobby lounge needed a premium ceiling gesture that could work from daytime check-in to evening drinks. Oversized KO-XYM-0024 ring pendants defined seating clusters and introduced acoustic felt above reflective stone and glass surfaces.
results: Large circular forms gave the lounge a clear arrival signal
Dimming scenes separated daytime reception and evening lounge moods
Felt tones coordinated with upholstery and walnut wall panels

items.name: Garden Lane Breakfast Cafe
items.sector: Lifestyle hotel cafe and breakfast bar
items.designRole: Cafe operator, fit-out contractor and electrical installer
items.product: Sand and terracotta canopy felt pendants, warm integrated LED, counter rows
items.alt: Cafe bar with KO-XYM-0127 soft canopy PET Felt pendant lamps above counter seating
items.brief: A hotel cafe needed softer table lighting for breakfast service and a more relaxed material finish than hard metal shades. KO-XYM-0127 canopy pendants were placed above the counter and cafe tables to connect lighting with the warm interior palette.
results: Canopy form kept the bar area visually light and approachable
Felt colors echoed terracotta seating and pale oak joinery
Suspension heights were planned around counter sightlines

spec.title: Typical choices for restaurant and hospitality acoustic lighting.

rows.label: Recommended products
rows.value: Drum pendants, ribbed ring pendants, canopy felt pendants, petal pendants and disc felt pendants

rows.label: Common CCT
rows.value: 2700K-3000K for restaurants, bars and hotel lounges; 3500K where brighter cafe service is needed

rows.label: Control options
rows.value: Non-dim, 1-10V or DALI for dining, reception and event scenes

rows.label: Customization
rows.value: Pendant diameter, felt color, suspension length, LED output, dimming, carton labels and project packaging

cta.title: Send your seating plan, ceiling height and target atmosphere.
cta.text: FLOSEEK can help match product family, felt color, pendant size, wattage, CCT and control method for restaurants, cafes, hotels and guest-facing lounges.

seo.title: Commercial Interiors Acoustic Lighting Projects | FLOSEEK
seo.description: Explore commercial interiors acoustic lighting applications for retail showrooms, reception areas, lounges and public interiors using PET Felt lighting products.

hero.title: Acoustic lighting for retail, reception and shared interiors.
hero.text: FLOSEEK helps commercial interiors combine brand atmosphere, comfortable light and PET Felt acoustic material in one project-ready lighting package.
hero.imageAlt: Retail showroom with KO-XYM-0139 square-frame PET Felt acoustic pendant lights

intro.title: Create recognizable zones without adding visual clutter.
intro.text: Retail, reception and shared amenity spaces need lighting that supports product display, wayfinding and acoustic comfort. PET Felt acoustic luminaires can define zones above counters, display tables, waiting benches and lounge seating while keeping material finishes coordinated.

items.title: Brand-ready interiors
items.text: Use felt color and fixture geometry to reinforce the project palette without relying on signage or decorative clutter.

items.title: Zoned light and sound
items.text: Place acoustic luminaires over display, waiting, consultation and lounge areas where people gather and speak.

items.title: Procurement support
items.text: Coordinate model selection, quantity schedules, packaging labels and replacement parts for repeat commercial rollouts.

cases.title: Commercial interior case studies for project buyers and designers.
cases.text: The following original examples are written in a real project-reference format while using newly generated scene imagery and FLOSEEK product models.

items.name: Gallery Row Lifestyle Showroom
items.designRole: Retail design studio and lighting consultant
items.product: Charcoal square-frame PET Felt acoustic pendant lights, display-table alignment
items.alt: Retail showroom with KO-XYM-0139 square acoustic pendant lights above display tables
items.brief: A lifestyle showroom needed a lighting feature that could organize loose furniture displays while keeping the ceiling visually quiet. KO-XYM-0139 square acoustic pendants were aligned above display tables to frame product zones and add felt texture to the open retail floor.
results: Square geometry echoed modular display plinths
Integrated downlight improved table merchandising
Charcoal felt created contrast without heavy ceiling panels

items.name: City Center Tenant Reception
items.sector: Commercial building reception and waiting area
items.designRole: Commercial interior contractor and electrical consultant
items.product: Warm grey and teal PET Felt wall/ceiling acoustic luminaires behind reception
items.alt: Commercial reception area with KO-XYM-0215 PET Felt acoustic wall and ceiling lighting
items.brief: The reception area needed a visible acoustic feature that would not compete with the stone desk and timber wall. KO-XYM-0215 felt light panels were composed behind the counter and above the waiting bench to combine soft glow with acoustic surface.
results: Rounded panels gave the reception wall a calmer identity
Felt colors connected the desk backdrop and waiting area
Wall-light layout kept ceiling services accessible

items.name: Northbank Clubhouse Work Lounge
items.designRole: Amenity-space designer, furniture partner and installer
items.product: Acoustic floor lamps beside sofas plus layered disc felt pendants over shared tables
items.alt: Commercial clubhouse lounge with KO-XYM-0198 acoustic floor lamps and KO-XYM-0121 disc felt pendants
items.brief: A clubhouse lounge needed softer light around sofas while keeping shared work tables brighter. Acoustic floor lamps provided movable comfort near seating, while layered disc pendants created a quieter ceiling focus above communal tables.
results: Floor lamps supported flexible lounge reconfiguration
Disc pendants identified shared work tables without partitions
Warm-neutral lighting kept the space suitable for work and evening events

spec.title: Typical choices for commercial interior acoustic lighting projects.

rows.label: Recommended products
rows.value: Square acoustic pendants, wall/ceiling acoustic lights, disc pendants, acoustic floor lamps and custom linear lights

rows.label: Common CCT
rows.value: 3000K for lounges and hospitality-like retail, 3500K-4000K for reception and display tasks

rows.label: Control options
rows.value: Non-dim, 1-10V or DALI depending on retail scenes, reception hours and event use

rows.label: Customization
rows.value: Felt color, fixture geometry, mounting type, quantity schedule, carton marks, OEM labels and documentation

cta.title: Send the space type, reflected ceiling plan and desired design effect.
cta.text: FLOSEEK can support product selection, felt color matching, layout advice, sample planning and quotation for retail, reception, public lounge and commercial fit-out projects.
